allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=d.get\('packages',{}\); relevant=['','node_modules/next','node_modules/react','node_modules/tailwindcss','node_modules/typescript','node_modules/jest']; [print\(k,pkgs[k].get\('version',''\)\) for k in relevant if k in pkgs]")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const p=l.packages||{}; ['','node_modules/next','node_modules/react','node_modules/tailwindcss','node_modules/typescript','node_modules/jest','node_modules/framer-motion','node_modules/prisma'].forEach\(k=>{ if\(p[k]\) console.log\(k||'root', p[k].version||''\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const p=l.packages||{}; const keys=['node_modules/@testing-library/react','node_modules/@testing-library/jest-dom','node_modules/@testing-library/user-event','node_modules/@prisma/client','node_modules/zod','node_modules/react-hook-form','node_modules/resend','node_modules/date-fns']; keys.forEach\(k=>{ if\(p[k]\) console.log\(k, p[k].version||''\) }\)")
